form.editExtraColors: This row keeps the first selected color (after your edits); each extra color creates a new product with the same brand, model, and size.

notifications.errSizeMax: Size must be 20 characters or less.
notifications.errSelectColor: Please select at least one color.
notifications.errVariantExists: This product variant is already in the catalog (same brand, model, size, and color).
notifications.errVariantExistsNoAdd: That product variant is already included (same brand, model, size, and color). No duplicate rows were added.
notifications.updatedWithVariants: Product updated. Added {{added}} new variant(s). Skipped {{skipped}} already in the catalog.
notifications.updatedWithVariantsSimple: Product updated. Created {{count}} additional color variant(s).

notifications.errModel: Please select or enter a model.

notifications.errAlreadyIncluded: This product has already been included (same brand, model, size, and color).
notifications.createdWithSkipped: Created {{created}} product(s). Skipped {{skipped}} variant(s) already in the catalog.
notifications.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
